title: IT Trainer
description:
Job Title: IT Trainer

Overview

Trainocate Singapore is a leading training provider delivering cutting-edge learning solutions in AWS, Cisco, Microsoft, and many other technologies.  We specialize in empowering both technical professionals and end users to adopt and maximize digital tools for business success.

Job Summary:

We are looking for a dynamic and experienced IT Trainer to deliver high-quality training to internal teams, partners, and end-users.  The ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in IT systems and applications, a passion for teaching, and preferably hold the Advanced Certificate in Learning and Performance (ACLP). This role involves both instructional delivery and content development across a range of technologies, with a focus on Microsoft courses and other relevant IT courses.

Key Responsibilities:

Deliver instructor-led and virtual classroom training on Microsoft technologies (e.g., Microsoft 365, Azure, Power Platform, Copilot, Sharepoint) and other IT system as required. 

Work closely with key vendors to ensure training content is accurate, up-to-date, and aligned with business needs.

Provide quality and technically relevant instruction, assessment, and feedback in both lecture and hands-on lab environments.

Prepare and maintain comprehensive course syllabus, ensuring all learning objectives are clearly defined and met.

Design, update, and maintain all instructional course materials, including manuals, presentations, and training content.

Utilize modern training technologies such as video conferencing, distance learning platforms, and Learning Management Systems (LMS).

Conduct training needs analysis to identify skill gaps and recommend appropriate learning solutions.

Demonstrate a strong desire to excel in both training delivery and IT consulting.

Stay current with industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices in IT and adult learning.

Continuously evaluate training effectiveness and implement improvements based on feedback and performance metrics.

Requirements:

Diploma or Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.

Proven experience as an IT Trainer, Technical Instructor, or similar role.

Strong knowledge of enterprise software, productivity tools, and IT systems.

Excellent communication, facilitation, and presentation skills.

Familiarity with adult learning principles and instructional design methodologies.

Certifications such as Microsoft Certified Trainer (MCT) Advanced Certificate in Learning and Performance (ACLP) and other vendor certifications are a plus.

Experience with e-learning tools and Learning Management Systems (LMS) is an advantage.

Preferred Attributes:

Passionate about teaching and helping others grow.

Able to simplify complex technical concepts for diverse audiences.

Self-motivated, adaptable, and committed to continuous learning.

Strong organizational and time management skills.

postedCompany.description:
TRAINOCATE is one of the most trusted IT and human capability development training providers in Asia.  We are passionate about providing our customers with the most relevant industry-recognized certifications and courses that will propel them to the pinnacle of their careers.

With more than 20 years of experience under our belt, TRAINOCATE’s specialty is in the purveyance of vendor specific technologies and certifications, high-end IT solutions, customized and bespoke content as well as a robust portfolio of business and management skills delivered via a range of convenient modalities.

At TRAINOCATE, we are strong advocates of lifelong-learning as knowledge and skills gained ensures competitiveness and survivability in the dynamic workplace.  We thrive when our customers unlock their potential through learning goals and we strive to always thoroughly understand their needs and requirements to ensure an optimal learning experience.
postedCompany.name: TRAINOCATE (S) PTE. LTD.
